title: Stir-Fried Fermented Greek Celery
description: A savory Asian-inspired dish combining the tangy flavors of fermented vegetables with the crunch of celery and the tang of Greek yogurt.

ingredients.name: Fermented Vegetables
ingredients.notes: any type, such as kimchi or sauerkraut

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the chopped celery and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until slightly tender.
Add the fermented vegetables and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes until heated through.
Stir in the Greek yogurt and cook for 1-2 minutes until the sauce has thickened.
Serve immediately over rice or noodles.
